description: A person or entity mark: the image when `src` is set, initials from `name` otherwise, with an optional presence dot.

src.description: Image URL. Absent renders initials from `name`.

name.description: The person or entity name. Its first two words' initials render when there is no `src`, and it is the image's alt text.

shape.description: Circle for a person, rounded for a team.

status.description: A presence dot in the state's colour. `offline` is a visible muted dot; omit `status` entirely for no dot. Optional — there is no invisible enum value.
